title: Iran's strategic oil island thrust into the spotlight as Middle East conflict escalates
summary_full: Kharg Island serves as the centerpiece for Iran's oil industry, accounting for roughly 90% of the country’s crude exports.
summary_public: Kharg Island serves as the centerpiece for Iran's oil industry, accounting for roughly 90% of the country’s crude exports.
